description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Main that runs on push events across multiple environments. Use a matrix strategy to test on macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows with various Node.js versions (21.x, 20.x, 18.x, 16.x) and .NET 8.0.x. For each job, check out the code, set up Node.js and .NET, install dependencies with npm install, and run tests for .NET 4.x (on Windows) and .NET Core, generating test reports.
